name: pr-testing
description: Downloads and tests Aspire CLI from a PR build, preferably in the repo-local container runner under eng/scripts, verifies version, and runs test scenarios based on PR changes.
intent_triggers: use the pr testing agent skill
run a workflow for pr testing

幫我啟用 pr testing 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 pr testing
